headline: **MLB Daily Recap: May 17, 2026**
article:
The Toronto Blue Jays edged out the Detroit Tigers 2-1, with Yohendrick Piñango leading the charge with 2 hits, including a home run, and 1 RBI. The St. Louis Cardinals secured a 4-2 victory over the Kansas City Royals, with Kyle Leahy earning the win after 6.0 innings of work. The Colorado Rockies secured a 4-2 victory over the Arizona Diamondbacks, with Tomoyuki Sugano earning the win and Antonio Senzatela securing the save.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, including Jake Fraley of the Tampa Bay Rays, who has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a hernia. The San Francisco Giants have also placed Heliot Ramos on the 10-day injured list with a right quad strain. Other notable injuries include Ben Joyce of the Los Angeles Angels, Trevor Story of the Boston Red Sox, Clay Holmes of the New York Mets, Max Fried of the New York Yankees, Matt Strahm of the Kansas City Royals, and Matt Waldron of the San Diego Padres.

The Chicago White Sox have acquired center fielder Junior Perez from the Athletics in exchange for left-handed pitcher Jackson Nove. The Athletics have also traded right-handed pitcher Kyle Robinson to the Pittsburgh Pirates for second baseman Alika Williams, and right-handed pitcher Eduarniel Núñez to the Baltimore Orioles for cash.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays Take Down Tigers in Thrilling 2-1 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays edged out the Detroit Tigers 2-1, securing their win behind a strong performance from their lineup. Yohendrick Piñango led the charge with 2 hits, including a home run, and 1 RBI.

top_news.title: **Cardinals Take Down Royals 4-2**
top_news.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals secured a 2-4 victory over the Kansas City Royals, with Kyle Leahy earning the win after 6.0 innings of work. Jac Caglianone led the Royals' offense with 2 hits, including a 5th home run of the season.

top_news.title: **Rockies Take Down Diamondbacks 4-2**
top_news.summary: The Colorado Rockies secured a 4-2 victory over the Arizona Diamondbacks, with Tomoyuki Sugano earning the win and Antonio Senzatela securing the save. Mickey Moniak led the Diamondbacks' offense with 2 RBI.

top_news.title: **Nationals Rout Orioles 13-3**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals dominated the Baltimore Orioles, securing a 13-3 victory. Keibert Ruiz led the Nationals' offense with a 3-hit, 5-RBI performance, including a home run.

top_news.title: **Rays Place Jake Fraley on 10-Day Injured List**
top_news.summary: Tampa Bay Rays right fielder Jake Fraley has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a hernia, effective retroactive to May 16, 2026.

top_news.title: **White Sox Acquire Junior Perez in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Chicago White Sox have acquired center fielder Junior Perez from the Athletics in exchange for left-handed pitcher Jackson Nove. This move adds depth to the White Sox outfield.
